race.comment: Keen to back a couple here through the same race. DAVIDA (2) led and simply proved too good for UNDISPUTABLE (12) in Adelaide last start, going on to win by 2.25 lengths. She's very promising having strung a couple together in good time over the summer, which saw her smashed into $4 in a Group 2 behind Observer. Drawn wide here but if Bates can get across she can win again. UNDISPUTABLE had her chance last time but gets in very light here after the claim and draws much better off a short SP last time. LIKE A DRIFTER (1) is the interesting one, also over from SA having put up the picket fence this time in. Turns around quickly from a dominant win last week and has to be respected. BEECHWORTH (13) is a well-bred 3yo who resumed with a tidy BM62 win, he could measure up while JENNI GONE BONKERS (7) has the ability and can run well fresh.
